Common.missingYearDescription: Only the next available exercise can be created to keep the balance chain connected.
Common.nextStepDescription: Initialize {nextCreatableYear} to open the monthly overview and complete the planning.
Common.logout_confirm_description: Are you sure you want to log out? You will need to sign in again to access your data.

Settings.title: Settings
Settings.deleteAccountConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete your account? This action cannot be undone.
Settings.deleteAccountDialogDescription: This will delete your user, Google access, and all exercises, months, and entries. You will not be able to recover this data.
Settings.deleteAccountError: Could not delete the account. Check the connection and try again.

Annual.title: Annual Summary
Annual.configDescription: Adjust the base values for the year. Changes apply to the forecast and export.
Annual.description: Review the expected closing balance, accumulated savings, and monthly trend for the year.
Annual.exportDescription: Export the full year in Excel with the latest configuration.
Annual.savingDescription: Configuration changes are being saved before launching year actions.

kpis.totalSavingsNote: Net savings generated during the year
kpis.bestMonthNote: Highest savings recorded in one month
kpis.estimatedBalanceNote: Expected balance at the end of December
kpis.activeMonths: {count, plural, one {# active month} other {# active months}}
kpis.investmentMonths: {count, plural, one {# month invested} other {# months invested}}

config.startingBalanceDescription: Automatically updated with the projected closure of the previous exercise.
config.startingBalanceEditableDescription: You can adjust it manually because it is the first available exercise in your account.
config.hasExtraPaymentsDescription: Adds a fixed extra pay in June and December.
config.estimatedExtraPayment: Estimated amount for each extra pay

Setup.title: Configure {year}
Setup.subtitle: Financial year kickoff
Setup.descriptionEditable: Define the starting point of the year, estimated salary, and fixed expenses. Gridly automatically fills the months and keeps the monthly flow connected.
Setup.descriptionFixed: Only the next available exercise can be created. Gridly starts {year} with the closing forecast of {previousYear}.
Setup.formDescriptionEditable: Enter the estimates for the year. You can adjust them at any time.
Setup.startingBalanceNote: Only the next exercise can be created and its starting balance is automatically calculated from {previousYear}.
Setup.redirectionNote: Return to the flow where you were
Setup.hasExtraPaymentsDescription: When enabled, Gridly fills June and December with the amount you enter.
Setup.estimatedExtraPayment: Estimated amount for each extra pay (€)
Setup.errorOnlyNextYear: Only the next available exercise can be created.
Setup.errorGeneric: Could not create the year. Please check the data and try again.
Setup.errorConnection: Could not create the year. Please check the connection and try again.

Landing.heroTitle: Control income, expenses, and savings with a vision that fits.
Landing.heroDescription: Gridly converts your financial year into a coherent chain: from the starting balance to the monthly close, with an annual summary, quick editing, and Excel export.
Landing.accountDeletedDescription: Your account and data have been deleted successfully.
Landing.authErrorDescription: You are not signed in. You can try again whenever you want.

monthly.title: Monthly Control
monthly.description: Track income, fixed expenses, and additional movements without losing the balance thread.

chained.title: Chained Savings
chained.description: Each month starts where the previous one ended so the annual balance is coherent.

annual.title: Annual Summary
annual.description: Visualize the complete exercise and export the history whenever you need it.

preview.title: Preview
preview.connectedBalance: Balance connected with the previous close

month.description: Explore {month} {year} with sample data in read-only mode. Sign in with Google to create your own private workspace.

summary.title: Annual Summary {year}
summary.description: Explore the projected close for {year} with sample data. Sign in with Google to create your own private workspace.

overview.editMonthAria: Edit fixed income and expenses for {month}
overview.viewMonthAria: View fixed income and expenses for {month}
overview.additionalExpensesDescription: One-off movements that reduce the month's savings.
overview.noAdditionalExpenses: There are no additional expenses yet. Add one if this month has a one-off adjustment.
overview.additionalIncomeDescription: Extraordinary income that improves the final balance.
overview.noAdditionalIncome: There is no additional income yet. Add one if applicable.

income.title: Fixed Income
income.description: Base income for the month, including extra pays and bonuses when applicable.

fixedExpenses.title: Fixed Expenses
fixedExpenses.description: Budgets for recurring expenses and investments.

additionalEntries.descriptionIncome: Register occasional income that increases this month's balance.
additionalEntries.descriptionExpense: Track occasional expenses for adjustments or non-recurring purchases.
additionalEntries.confirmDeleteDescription: "{label}" will be removed from the list. This action cannot be undone.

summary.title: Summary
summary.description: Final monthly reading with balance, spending, and net savings.
